data.title: Mayur Uniquoters Strengthens Governance with New Appointments
data.description:
Mayur Uniquoters Limited ( (IN:MAYURUNIQ) ) has provided an update.

Mayur Uniquoters Limited has announced the appointment of M/s V.M. & Associates as the Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term starting April 2025, reflecting the company’s commitment to maintaining robust compliance and governance standards. Additionally, the re-appointment of Mr. Suresh Kumar Poddar as Chairman and Managing Director & CEO for another three years ensures continuity in leadership, which is expected to positively impact the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder confidence.

More about Mayur Uniquoters Limited

Mayur Uniquoters Limited operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing synthetic leather. The company is known for its high-quality products used in various sectors, including automotive, footwear, and fashion.

data.title: Rajesh Exports Reports Strong Q2 Financial Results
data.description:
Rajesh Exports Limited ( (IN:RAJESHEXPO) ) has issued an update.

Rajesh Exports Limited has announced its unaudited financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company reported a net profit of Rs. 176.47 million, a significant improvement from the previous quarter’s loss of Rs. 162.93 million. This positive financial performance reflects the company’s strong operational capabilities and could enhance its market positioning, potentially benefiting stakeholders by increasing investor confidence and market value.

More about Rajesh Exports Limited

Rajesh Exports Limited is a manufacturer and exporter of gold and diamond jewelry, headquartered in Bengaluru, India. The company operates in the precious metals industry, focusing on the production and global distribution of high-quality jewelry products.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: QcX Gold Completes $750,000 Private Placement to Boost Exploration Efforts
data.description:
QcX Gold ( (TSE:QCX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

QcX Gold Corp. has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement financing, raising $750,000 through the issuance of 7,500,000 units. The proceeds will be used for exploration and evaluation of the Golden Giant and Fernet properties, as well as for general working capital. The announcement signifies a strategic move to bolster the company’s exploration efforts in promising regions of Québec, potentially enhancing its market position and offering growth opportunities for stakeholders.

More about QcX Gold

QcX Gold is a company focused on exploring for gold and VMS style mineralization in Québec, Canada. Its key projects include the Golden Giant Project in the James Bay region and the Fernet Project in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, both located near major discoveries, enhancing their exploration potential.

Average Trading Volume: 13,033

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1.06M

data.title: Tenaris Shareholders Adjust Holdings Amid Buyback Program
data.description:
Tenaris SA ( (TS) ) has shared an announcement.

On September 19, 2025, Tenaris S.A. announced that its controlling shareholders, San Faustin S.A. and Techint Holdings S.à r.l., filed an amendment to Schedule 13D with the SEC. This filing was in response to Tenaris’s ongoing share buyback program, which led to a passive increase in San Faustin’s beneficial ownership. To manage their portfolio, San Faustin’s board authorized Techint Holdings to sell some of its Tenaris shares, ensuring their ownership does not drop below 67%. The timing and amount of these sales will depend on market conditions, with no assurance of completion. This move highlights Tenaris’s strategic financial management amid its share repurchase efforts.

The most recent analyst rating on (TS) stock is a Buy with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tenaris SA stock, see the TS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TS is a Outperform.

Tenaris SA’s overall stock score reflects its strong financial performance and attractive valuation. However, technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and mixed earnings call sentiment highlights challenges such as declining sales and tariff impacts. The company’s robust cash position and strategic project deliveries provide some optimism.

To see Spark’s full report on TS stock, click here.

More about Tenaris SA

Tenaris is a leading global supplier of steel tubes and related services for the world’s energy industry and certain other industrial applications.

Average Trading Volume: 1,556,969

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $18.95B

data.title: Aeluma, Inc. Director Terminates Stock Trading Plan
data.description:
Aeluma, Inc. ( (ALMU) ) has provided an announcement.

On June 23, 2025, Aeluma, Inc. director Mr. Steven DenBaars adopted a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan to sell up to 130,000 shares of the company’s common stock. However, on September 16, 2025, Mr. DenBaars terminated the plan, resulting in no sales being made under this arrangement.

data.title: Pearl Diver Credit Announces $15M Equity Offering
data.description:
Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. ( (PDCC) ) has shared an update.

Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. has announced an ‘at the market’ equity offering of its common stock, with a total value of up to $100 million, under a registration statement filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. On September 19, 2025, the company filed a prospectus supplement for the issuance of shares worth up to $15 million, with Lucid Capital Markets, LLC acting as the placement agent. The company is not obligated to sell the shares and may suspend offers at any time, with the placement agent receiving a commission based on the sales price.

The most recent analyst rating on (PDCC) stock is a Buy with a $19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. stock, see the PDCC Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Canadian Critical Minerals Secures $600,000 for Bull River Mine Expansion
data.description:
Canadian Critical Minerals ( (TSE:CCMI) ) has provided an update.

Canadian Critical Minerals Inc. has successfully closed a flow-through financing deal, raising $600,000 to fund exploration and development activities at its Bull River Mine project in British Columbia. This financial move is expected to bolster the company’s operational capabilities and strengthen its position in the copper mining industry, potentially benefiting stakeholders through enhanced project development.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CCMI) stock is a Buy with a C$0.22 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canadian Critical Minerals stock, see the TSE:CCMI Stock Forecast page.

More about Canadian Critical Minerals

Canadian Critical Minerals Inc. is a mining company focused on copper production assets in Canada. Its main asset is the Bull River Mine project near Cranbrook, British Columbia, which contains copper, gold, and silver. The company also holds interests in other copper projects in Ontario and Quebec.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions Undergoes Creditor Protection in Canada
data.description:
An update from SRx Health Solutions ( (SRXH) ) is now available.

SRx Health Solutions, through its Canadian subsidiary SRx Canada, is undergoing creditor protection under the Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act (CCAA) as of August 2025. The Ontario Superior Court of Justice is overseeing the proceedings, and by September 15, 2025, most of SRx Canada’s assets have been sold through court-approved transactions, expected to close in the coming weeks.

The most recent analyst rating on (SRXH) stock is a Hold with a $0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SRx Health Solutions stock, see the SRXH Stock Forecast page.
